programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Paulie Ayala vs Johnny Tapia 1
programme.desc: On June 26th, 1999, Paulie Ayala fought Johnny Tapia for the WBA Bantamweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In what was the 1999 Ring Magazine Fight of the Year, the two men put on a show that ended with an Ayala unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Randall Bailey vs Mike Jones
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Randall Bailey and Mike Jones fought for vacant IBF World welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas that ended in the 11th round by knockout resulting in a victory for Bailey.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Arturo Frias
programme.desc: On May 8th, 1982 Ray Mancini and Arturo Frias fought for the WBA World Lightweight title at the Aladdin in Las Vegas with what was supposed to be a 15 round bout ending in the first by technical knockout securing the victory for Ray Mancini.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Orlando Romero
programme.desc: On September 15th, 1983 Ray Mancini fought Orlando Romero for the WBA World Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with the bout ending in the ninth round by knockout earning Mancini the win.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Bert Cooper
programme.desc: On August 5th, 1990 Ray Mercer faced Bert Cooper for Heavyweight titles at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City with the bout ending by unanimous decision in favor of Mercer.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Tommy Morrison
programme.desc: On October 18th, 1991 Ray Mercer faced Tommy Morrison for the WBO World Heavyweight titles at the Convention Center in Atlantic City ending in technical knockout by Mercer earning him the victory and title but, he relinquished the title shortly after.

programme.title: Rob Brant vs Ryota Murata 1
programme.desc: On October 20th, 2018 Rob Brant faced Ryota Murata for a second time for the WBA World Middleweight title at the Park Theater in Las Vegas that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Brant.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Abraham Nova
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022, Robeisy Ramirez and Abraham Nova fought for the IBF USBA & WBO Global Featherweight titles at Madison Square Garden resulting in a knockout victory for Robeisy Ramirez.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Brandon Valdes
programme.desc: On December 12th, 2020, Robeisy Ramirez fought Brandon Valdes in a featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Ramirez showed his impressive speed and natural power, stopping Valdes in the sixth round.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 24th, 1989, Roberto Duran fought Iran Barkley for the WBC Middleweight Title in Atlantic City. Duran, known for his relentless aggression, defeated Barkley by a close split decision in what was named The Ring Fight of the Year for 1989.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Jimmy Batten
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982 Roberto Duran faced Jimmy Batten at the Orange Bowl in Miami, Fl. It ended in an unanimous decision victory for Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Roman Gonzalez vs. Juan Francisco Estrada 1
programme.desc: On November 17th, 2012, Roman Gonzalez fought Juan Francisco Estrada for the WBA World Light Flyweight Title at the Sports Arena in Los Angeles. In a successful title defense fight, Gonzalez earned the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Transformers: Energon

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: A new summer of love starts tonight as Caroline Flack welcomes 2019's line up of young singles to the Love Island villa. Iain Stirling also returns as show narrator with his inimitable take on all the island action.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: `Love Island' continues as our cast of young singles settle into villa life and their daily routine of dating, flirting, dumping and more. The Islanders are already discovering that in paradise, you'd better be ready to expect the unexpected.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: There are plenty more surprises in store for the class of 2019. One thing they know for sure is that, in the villa, not everything is quite what it seems. And with £50,000 up for grabs, no one wants to be the first to be dumped.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Things are hotting up in paradise. The class of 2019 are settling into a summer of love and romance they will never forget. There's no let up in the drama for the Islanders, and with £50,000 up for grabs for the winning couple, the pressure is on.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The first week is almost over and 2019's Islanders have already discovered that making paradise your home is easier said than done. Our gorgeous singles came looking for romance and a load of fun in the sun, but no one wants to be dumped.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Packed with unseen action from an unforgettable first week in the Love Island villa, along with a recap of all the big stories, the best moments and much, much more. Join Iain Stirling as he reveals brand new and exclusive footage.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: While life in the luxurious villa might look like fun, the Islanders are already finding out that nothing is certain in paradise. There's heartbreak on the horizon and with £50,000 up for grabs, the stakes simply couldn't be higher.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The gorgeous young things are busy enjoying their days of romance, flirting and endless fun in the sun. But they can't let their guards down because things can change quickly in paradise and nobody knows what's around the next corner.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The second week continues and the islanders are already experiencing a summer they'll never forget. But as ever, there are plenty of twists and turns for them, and with £50,000 up for grabs for the winners, everybody's in it for the long haul.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature's rising and there are plenty more surprises in store. As ever, nothing is quite what it seems in paradise. And with that cash prize of £50,000 up for grabs for the winning couple in seven weeks' time, everyone wants to couple up.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The temperature just keeps on rising in paradise. Our gorgeous young things are having an absolute blast, but some are coupling while others are in danger of being dumped. Right now - nobody wants to go home.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the end of week two and the islanders are having the time of their lives, but as the love games continue, no-one knows what's waiting around the next corner. And with just one couple in with a chance of winning, the battle to stay is on.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's time for another feast of unseen moments from the villa. All the flirting, fun, romance and juiciest gossip is waiting right here, along with a recap of all the big stories and the best moments of the week.

programme.title: Love Island

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, the Gator Gold Rush is in full swing. Buyers are paying top dollar for alligators, and Troy has a plan to get his share. He's taking a special boat called a "Gator Tail" to an old family honey hole.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Day three of the month-long alligator season in Louisiana finds the hunters working at a frantic pace to fill their tags. King of the Swamp, Troy Landry, and Master hunter, Junior Edwards is following identical strategies.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Tommy is on his own for the first time in his career. His stepdad Joe wrecked his back while wrangling gators, so now Tommy must carry the load all by himself.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As the end of week one comes to a close hunters are faced with new challenges. Troy makes a shocking discovery, a monster gator is feeding dangerously close to his home.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Flooding in the Mississippi Delta has raised water levels almost two feet and now the once unreachable corners of the bayou are accessible.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rygaard tries to tame two monsters at the same time--the super-juiced Mean Bean and the downhill site on which it's deployed. Pihl's greenhorn must prove herself to the crew.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: About Hart
programme.desc: After using his powers to escape from Heartland City, Hart unleashes a path of destruction that only Yuma can help stop!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Losing Hart
programme.desc: As Kite desperately searches for his brother, Vetrix puts his diabolical plan for revenge in motion.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: A Dubious Duo
programme.desc: Vetrix continues his quest to drain Hart of all his powers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Dragon Awakens
programme.desc: Kite must learn to work with Yuma if he wants to take down Trey and Quattro and rescue Hart. Can Kite put his pride aside and accept Yuma’s help, or will Kite’s ego end up sacrificing Hart’s safety?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Faced with tough decisions, Yuma decides to run away from his problems and search for his father until Master Roku confronts him, forcing him to face a few hard truths.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The race for entry into the World Duel Carnival sees Nistro clash with TV superhero The Sparrow.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Family Leave
programme.desc: Trey makes an unexpected visit to Yuma’s house and discovers the secret behind Yuma’s incredible dueling skills.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: After accepting Trey’s challenge to a duel, Yuma soon learns that Trey has acquired a dark and dangerous new power.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Exit: Astral
programme.desc: With the bond between Astral and Yuma broken, Trey takes aim at the rest of Yuma’s life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Crestfallen
programme.desc: The back-and-forth battle between Trey and Yuma reaches its climactic conclusion! Can Yuma defeat Trey without Astral’s assistance or will Trey triumph, leaving Yuma one Heart Piece short of making it to the finals?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Party Panic
programme.desc: Yuma and his friends get all decked out for the event of the year - the World Duel Carnival Finals party! But when Yuma forgets his invite, can he find a way into the festivities, or will he be forced to hit the road and head home early?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roller Duel!
programme.desc: It’s time for the World Duel Carnival Finals! But prepare for a world of twists and turns because the finalists will be dueling on a roller coaster! Can Yuma handle the ups and downs of the competition, or will he be sent for a loop?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Roller Coaster Rampage!
programme.desc: To assess Yuma’s dueling skills, Vetrix hires the Triad of Terror, a trio of cunning card sharks, to triple team him! Yuma better figure out a way to roll through this threesome before his dueling goes off the rails!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Test Your Luck!
programme.desc: The World Duel Carnival takes a dark turn as the finalists descend into the Dragon’s Den – a dark and dangerous duel track that will bring defeat for many a duelist!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The heat's on when Vetrix and Dextra duel in the jungle to decide who moves on to the World Duel Carnival semifinals!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Portal of Doom
programme.desc: Quinton takes a timeout during his duel against Kite to reveal the long-hidden mystery about Yuma’s father’s disappearance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Cosmic Chaos
programme.desc: Quinton and Kite’s confrontation in the cosmos comes to a climactic conclusion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Depths of Darkness
programme.desc: Shark finally faces off with his archenemy, Quattro! Will Shark get his long awaited revenge, or will he end up sleeping with the fishes?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Swimming with Sharks
programme.desc: It’s the cataclysmic conclusion between Shark and Quattro! If Shark doesn’t make a comeback from the depths of defeat, not only is he out of the tournament, but his quest for justice will go unserved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Rockin’ and Rollin’
programme.desc: There’s chaos in the canyon when Yuma duels Nistro to see who will get the last spot in the World Duel Carnival semifinals! Can Yuma dodge defeat in the desert, or is Nistro destined to rock Yuma's world?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Doctor Visit
programme.desc: When Yuma’s deck goes missing, he and the gang set out to look for it! But when their search leads them to Heartland City, they end up finding much more than they bargained for!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Duel of Destiny: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma sets his sights on reeling in Shark in the first battle of the semifinals, but when his foe starts off dueling like a guppy, Yuma questions if he’s being baited! Does Yuma learn this far too late to escape a sinister Shark attack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Duel of Destiny: Part 2
programme.desc: This is it! Yuma’s jaw-dropping duel against Shark in the World Duel Carnival semifinals draws to a finish! Can Yuma rise above his razor-sharp rival, or will he be dragged down to the depths of defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Hart of the Matter
programme.desc: The mighty masked duelist Vetrix faces off against the Number Hunter Kite! Unfortunately for Kite, Vetrix springs a shocking surprise that makes dueling all but impossible!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Change of Hart
programme.desc: The explosive end to the battle between Kite and Vetrix roars to a finish! As the battle climaxes, Yuma sets out to free Kite’s brother Hart from Vetrix’s grasp, while Kite duels knowing full well that Hart’s safety hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 1
programme.desc: It all comes down to this! Yuma squares off against Vetrix in a battle that will determine the first ever World Duel Carnival Champion!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Sphere of Fear: Part 2
programme.desc: As the duel between Vetrix and Yuma races to its cataclysmic conclusion, Yuma stares down defeat and comes face-to-face with Vetrix’s shocking secret!

programme.title: Victorious: Survival of the Hottest
programme.desc: A heat wave hits LA and the gang heads for the beach in Beck's RV. But once there, they find themselves trapped inside the RV as the temperature rises. Oblivious, Cat parties it up with some cute boys.

programme.title: Victorious: Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed, leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat, but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: Victorious: Freak the Freak Out
programme.desc: Tori's friends sing at a local karaoke club and end up competing with a pair of stuck-up girls who are regular performers there. Competing with those girls proves to be more difficult than they expect, since one of the girls' father owns the club.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck Falls for Tori
programme.desc: Tori auditions for a role in a movie. But after exaggerating on her resume, she gets hired as a stunt double. When Tori finds out her stunt is falling off a building, she's not sure she can do it.

programme.title: Victorious: Helen Back Again
programme.desc: When Principal Eikner leaves Hollywood Arts, the school hires a new principal who makes all the students re-audition in order to keep their spots. Who will get kicked out?

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Gets Stuck
programme.desc: Tori Gets Stuck: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy… Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: Victorious: Who Did it to Trina?
programme.desc: Trina stars in Tori's directorial debut, and there is a big accident on opening night. Lane wants to find out what went wrong. Everyone thinks it was an equipment malfunction, maybe it's sabotage.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tries to impress a new boyfriend by trying to look smarter than she is. Meanwhile, the gang tries to find T-Bo a new place to live after he gets kicked out of the Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A high-level government agency starts to inquire into the iCarly gang after they hack into a secure network to throw Carly's dad an online birthday party. *Guest Star - Michelle Obama

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets her toe stuck in a bathtub right before she is supposed to leave for a date. Meanwhile, Sam and the rest of the gang get trapped in Canada when she's caught trying to smuggle Fat Cakes over the border.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie wants to be recognized for his creative contributions to iCarly, so he comes up with a technology that allows people to see 3D webcasts without glasses. Unfortunately, it temporarily alters people's vision.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, the actor who plays Rex on Victorious, returns to host an in-depth interview with the stars of iCarly and to show their hilarious bloopers/outtakes.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After finding out their old captor, Nora, is being released from jail, the iCarly kids try to halt her release, but decide to allow it. They then return to her house, but will they make it out again?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly catches a contagious illness and accidentally gets a member of the band, One Direction, sick. Meanwhile, Spencer is stuck training a little girl who dislikes exercising.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: With Sam's help, Gibby opens a secret restaurant in the school's basement. Meanwhile, Spencer designs a security robot for the loft which goes unexpectedly haywire.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly and Spencer are being evicted from their apartment, and the gang reminisces about their time in Bushwell Plaza. Although, their memories may not be quite how we remember them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's new dream job becomes a nightmare when Sam gets hired too! Meanwhile, Carly tries to get a clueless guy to ask her out, and Spencer has to volunteer at the local firehouse.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The iCarly gang celebrate 'Halfoween' because they think Halloween is so great that it should come twice a year! But when Nevel pulls a prank on Carly and her friends, the party spins out of control.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer has a new nemesis - Chuck's more menacing younger brother, Chip! Meanwhile, Freddie fixes Gibby's toy phaser and gives it a power he never imagined!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly bans T-Bo from the loft, he retaliates by not letting Carly into the Groovy Smoothie. Meanwhile, Freddie and Gibby discover being in a band has many perks and a few drawbacks.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.
